utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 6 items requested in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). Therefore, all 6/6 items are included and fully specified.
